note: Explorer layout fix: place XAUT/BTC and PAXG/BTC under their USD pairs in the same column; restore SOST PRICE card + REFERENCE PRICE explanation that the previous patch accidentally split. The previous patch inserted the BTC row INSIDE the sostDisclaimer div of the SOST card, which broke the SOST explanation visually and made the BTC charts appear to be part of the SOST reference-price calculation. Layout is now a 3-column grid where each column is a .price-col flex-column wrapper: column 1 = XAUT/USD + XAUT/BTC stacked, column 2 = PAXG/USD + PAXG/BTC stacked, column 3 = SOST PRICE + REFERENCE PRICE explanation (no BTC charts in this column). The .price-cards grid stays at repeat(3,1fr) so column widths match the original. Responsive (max-width 768px) still collapses to single-column. All JS (cache namespace, fetch fan-out, tooltip, formatting) from the previous commit remains unchanged. No consensus / scripts / src changes.
